PowerShell($msg = "feat\(commande\): stock validation on order submission`n`nClient-side \(on load + on submit\):`n- Each cart row gets data-product-id/qty/stock from SSR`n- JS flags rows where qty exceeds stock_quantity`n- Per-row inline alert with available count and adjust button`n- Adjust button calls /api/cart/add \(set absolute qty\) then reloads`n- Remove button for zero-stock items calls /api/cart/remove`n- Submit disabled with block notice while violations exist`n`nServer-side race-condition guard:`n- POST now selects stock_quantity with cart items`n- Redirects to /commande?error=stock if any item exceeds stock`n- Distinct stockError banner vs generic server error`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
